creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
Hi, 
I have problem with nuvolaplayer, i clicked to spotify button 
and then player terminated by signal SIGABRT,

this is backterace from .core file 

(gdb) bt
#0  0x0000000804ab398a in kill () from /lib/libc.so.7
